title: abutilon durandoi
intro: Abutilon durandoi, also known as the Indian mallow or abutilon, is a plant species belonging to the Malvaceae family, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Abutilon durandoi include treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as having antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects. Abutilon durandoi can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
